properties.name: app.login-maintenance-mode
properties.description: When true, the login page redirects to the maintenance page instead of showing the login form.

properties.name: slack.bot-token
properties.description: Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) for Slack integration. Leave empty to disable Slack features.

properties.name: slack.signing-secret
properties.description: Slack Signing Secret for verifying incoming Slack event requests.

properties.name: zoom.meeting-base-url
properties.description: Base URL for Zoom meeting links (e.g. https://zoom.us/j).

properties.name: zoom.oauth-base-url
properties.description: Zoom OAuth token endpoint base URL.

properties.name: zoom.account-id
properties.description: Zoom account ID for Server-to-Server OAuth.

properties.name: openai.api-key
properties.description: OpenAI API key. When empty, SymptomCheckService falls back to keyword-based heuristics.

properties.name: openai.model
properties.description: OpenAI model ID to use for AI symptom checks.

properties.name: openai.base-url
properties.description: OpenAI API base URL. Override for Azure OpenAI or compatible proxies.
